title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spectators are making fun of the "mismatched
match" between Hishi Akebono and Biko Pegasus
from the stands before the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But while that's happening, the two racers
exchange a fiery handshake in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to see how the extra muscle Hishi
Akebono's gained will impact her performance on
the track! The Sprinters S. is finally underway!
